description: Parse receipts & invoices into structured JSON. Pay per call in USDC (x402 on Base), no API key.
name: com.wrapper-agency.parsedoc/parser

environmentVariables.description: EVM wallet private key holding USDC on Base. When set, calls the paid endpoint at $0.02/page. If unset, uses the free demo (3/day).
environmentVariables.name: X402_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://parsedoc.wrapper-agency.com.
environmentVariables.name: PARSEDOC_URL
